title: reviewport change manifest
description: A list of changes an AI agent made to a frontend, for a human to verify in the live UI. See docs/MANIFEST_SCHEMA.md.

id.description: Optional stable id for this review session. Used to namespace localStorage so two projects don't clobber each other's progress.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the agent produced this manifest.

task.description: Short human description of the task the agent was asked to do.

baseUrl.description: Optional hint for where the dev site is served, e.g. http://localhost:5174.

routeBase.description: Optional path prefix prepended to every change.route, e.g. '/docs' when the app is served under a sub-path.

defaults.description: Optional defaults merged into every change (e.g. a shared anchor.selector scope).

changes.description: The changes to review, in the order they should be walked through.

id.description: Unique, stable id within this manifest. Used for per-change accept/reject state and the export round-trip.

route.description: Path the change lives on, appended to routeBase for navigation. Use '.' to mean 'the current page, do not navigate' (single-page apps / demos).

title.description: Short human-readable label for the change.

category.description: Free-form category. Suggested: copy, typo, structure, naming, css, layout, a11y, config, content, semantics, other.

description.description: Optional longer explanation of what changed and why.

files.description: Optional source files touched, for the 'anchor not found' fallback and traceability.

state.description: Review state. Agents should emit 'pending'; the viewer manages transitions.

anchor.description: How to locate the change in the rendered page. A discriminated union on 'mode'. Resolution priority when authoring: text > code-marker > look-here.

value.description: Visible text to find on the page (a unique-ish substring).

occurrence.description: Which match to use if the text appears more than once (1-based).

selector.description: Optional CSS selector to scope the text search.

marker.description: A token/substring that appears in a rendered code block, used to mark the relevant line(s).

selector.description: Optional CSS selector to scope the code search.

lineHint.description: Optional human hint about which line, shown in the panel.

hint.description: Free-text 'look at this' instruction shown to the reviewer (for CSS/visual changes with no text anchor).

selector.description: Optional CSS selector to highlight/scroll to.
